title: Spell Infinity With Mending
description: The Spell_InfinityWithMending project removes the restriction that prevents using both the Spell Infinity and Mending enchantments together.
body:
This mod enhances the gameplay experience by making two powerful enchantments, **Spell Infinity** (from the RPG Series mods - **Spell Engine**) and **Mending**, compatible with each other. 

Typically, these enchantments cannot coexist, but this mod allows players to use both at the same time. With Spell Infinity, users can cast spells without worrying about using up their spell resources, while Mending ensures their gear self-repairs over time, making it more durable. 

Together, they offer a seamless, long-lasting magical experience that combines infinite spellcasting with the sustainability of Mending, giving players the best of both worlds in their adventures.
